changes.change: Hardened account-name bootstrap resolution by trying multiple profile endpoints, keeping legacy fallback, and accepting strict plain-text account-name payloads when JSON is unavailable.
Made stash status payload explicit when disabled by adding remediation reason and controlling feature flag metadata.
Clarified stash tabs 503 message to explicitly reference POE_ENABLE_ACCOUNT_STASH gate.
Added deterministic coverage for valid JSON, plain-text fallback after endpoint failures, nested profile payloads, and invalid/unresolvable account responses.
Added deterministic assertion for feature_unavailable stash status metadata (reason + featureFlag).
Added route-level stash status contract test for disabled gate behavior.
Updated runbook commands to distinguish stash status gate diagnostics from tabs retrieval availability.

direct_local_probe.command: .venv/bin/python - <<'PY' ... ApiApp bootstrap + stash status probe with mocked upstream resolution ... PY

stash_status_when_disabled.reason: set POE_ENABLE_ACCOUNT_STASH=true to enable stash APIs

verification.deployment_gate_note: Live stash tabs still require POE_ENABLE_ACCOUNT_STASH=true in deployment environment; this change makes that gate explicit in status payloads and tab-route messaging.
